mapper.sql: select c.id, c.user_id, c.title, c.status, c.teacher_id, c.teacher_joined_at, c.last_message_at, c.message_count, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.is_deleted, su.real_name as user_real_name, tu.real_name as teacher_real_name from yx_conversation c left join yx_user su on c.user_id = su.id and su.is_deleted = false left join yx_user tu on c.teacher_id = tu.id and tu.is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into yx_conversation (user_id, title, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{userId}, #{title}, 1, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update yx_conversation set title = #{title}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update yx_conversation set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update yx_conversation set status = 2, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, teacher_joined_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update yx_conversation set status = 1, teacher_id = null, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update yx_conversation set last_message_at = now(), message_count = message_count + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update yx_conversation set is_deleted = true, status = 0, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
